'''Terig''' was a moon of [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]]. Terig was purchased by the [[Tagge Mining Company|House of Tagge Mining Company]], which established massive drilling operations to harvest rare minerals such as [[scatrium]] and [[fravisite]].
